de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor

Class InnerBreakAndContinueReplacer

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTWalker
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTVisitor
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.InnerBreakAndContinueReplacer
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Visitor

    public class InnerBreakAndContinueReplacer
extends JavaASTVisitor
    This replaces all breaks and continues in a loop with break l, where l is a specified label. It is used in the transformation of a for loop to a while loop.
    See Also:
    LoopApplyHeadRule, LoopContractImpl

    • Field Summary

    • Constructor Detail

      • InnerBreakAndContinueReplacer

        public InnerBreakAndContinueReplacer(StatementBlock block,
                                     java.lang.Iterable<Label> loopLabels,
                                     Label breakLabel,
                                     Label continueLabel,
                                     Services services)
        Parameters:
        block - a block that begins with a loop.
        loopLabels - all labels belonging to the loop.
        breakLabel - the label used for break statements.
        continueLabel - the label used for continue statements.
        services - services.
